category_sources: source_facts.description says SWF manipulation and generation tools; official README describes utilities for working with Adobe Flash SWF files.
display_name_sources: official repository README heading is SWFTools; source_facts.name is swftools.
docs_sources: official repository README is the best visible documentation surface and repository contains an official doc directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository and source_facts.source-archive references SWFTools release sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists multiple SWF command-line tools; official README describes reading, combining, and creating SWF files from images, sound, videos, or source code.
